name: Censys
description: The Censys integration adds the ability to enrich IPs, web properties, and certificates in Palo Alto XSOAR and XSIAM with Censys Platform data. It also adds actions to initiate a Censys rescan of a host or web property and retrieve event history for an IP address. Additionally, users can find related infrastructure to a host, certificate, or web property.
author: Censys
